description:
A Flutter LLM Chat Client. Support Android & iOS & Harmony Next.

A Flutter LLM Chat Client. Support Android & iOS & Harmony Next.
✨ Features
- 🎨 Modern Design - Material You design language with dynamic color theming support (Android 12+).
- 🌙 Dark Mode - Perfectly adapted dark theme to protect your eyes.
- 🌍 Multi-language Support - Supports both English and Chinese interfaces.
- 🖥️ Multi-platform Support - Mobile (Android/iOS/Harmony) and Desktop (Windows/macOS/Linux).
- 🔄 Multi-provider Support - Supports major AI providers like OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic, etc.
- 🤖 Custom Assistants - Create and manage personalized AI assistants.
- 🖼️ Multimodal Input - Supports various formats including images, text documents, PDFs, Word documents, etc.
- 📝 Markdown Rendering - Full support for code highlighting, LaTeX formulas, tables, and more.
- 🎙️ Voice/TTS Providers - Built-in system TTS plus OpenAI / Google Gemini / ElevenLabs voice servers.
- 🛠️ MCP Support - Model Context Protocol tool integration.
- 🧰 Built-in MCP Tools - Includes a built-in MCP Fetch tool.
- 🔍 Web Search - Integrated with multiple search engines (Exa, Tavily, Zhipu, LinkUp, Brave, Bing, Metaso, SearXNG, Ollama, Jina, Perplexity, Bocha).
- 🧩 Prompt Variables - Supports dynamic variables like model name, time, etc.
- 📤 QR Code Sharing - Export and import provider configurations via QR codes.
- 💾 Data Backup - Supports chat history backup and restoration.
- 🌐 Custom Requests - Supports custom HTTP request headers and bodies.
- 🔡 Custom Fonts - Bring your own fonts (system fonts / Google Fonts).
- ⚙️ Android Background Generation - Keep chat generation running in the background (optional setting).
What's Changed
- feat: Add OpenAI Images API generation and editing support, with toggleable image mode for OpenAI and SenseNova image models.
- feat: Add optional image cropping after image selection.
- feat: Add Serper and Grok search provider support.
- feat: Add built-in search support for OpenRouter.
- feat: Add reasoning/thinking support for GPT-5.5, DeepSeek, and Google Gemma 4.
- feat: Add Claude Prompt Caching support for Anthropic and OpenRouter.
- feat: Add provider-specific tool metadata support for Claude and Gemini.
- feat: Add chat statistics page with usage trends, heatmap, rankings, and token metrics.
- feat: Add account balance query support for OpenAI-compatible providers.
- feat: Add configurable context compression options.
- feat: Add regeneration behavior settings, including trailing-message deletion and confirmation controls.
- feat: Add periodic backup reminder system.
- feat: Add chat follow-up suggestions.
- feat: Add assistant local tools, including clipboard, time info, and interactive ask_user questions.
- feat: Add MCP configuration tab to assistant settings.
- feat: Add customizable assistant edit tab ordering and section-list outline mode.
- feat: Add temporary chat mode.
- feat: Add lazy loading, sliding message window, and bidirectional loading for long chat histories, improving performance with very large message counts.
- feat: Add smooth text animation for streaming responses.
- feat: Enhance Markdown rendering with support for HTML details/summary/link tags, nested details, improved code block experience, and table export actions.
- feat: Add configurable visibility modes for desktop message navigation buttons.
- feat: Add desktop setting to show provider names in chat messages.
- feat: Set Linux GTK application and window icons.
- fix: Fix macOS window restoration and activation behavior.
- fix: Fix desktop hotkeys being included in data synchronization.
- fix: Fix Gemini thought signatures and internal part IDs in request payloads.
- fix: Fix image content being lost in tool-call continuation requests.
- fix: Fix selected-message export not using stored messages.
- fix: Fix several other known issues.
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Chevey339/kelivo/compare/v1.1.12...v1.1.13
